news.title:
Hindustan Copper plans a Chile trip to assess 5 mining block surveys.
The company aims to acquire nearly 4 mining blocks in Chile.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper plans a Chile trip to assess 5 mining block surveys.
The company aims to acquire nearly 4 mining blocks in Chile.

news.title:
Codelco, Chile's state miner, is in JV talks with Hindustan Copper Ltd for undeveloped copper deposits.
Investments may exceed $1 billion; both firms signed a MoU for exploration and training last year.
news.summary:
Codelco, Chile's state miner, is in JV talks with Hindustan Copper Ltd for undeveloped copper deposits.
Investments may exceed $1 billion; both firms signed a MoU for exploration and training last year.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper plans to reopen shut mines, targeting growth.
The company aims for 12.2 MTPA output within five years.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper plans to reopen shut mines, targeting growth.
The company aims for 12.2 MTPA output within five years.

news.title:
Metal stocks surged as US-Iran talks eased geopolitical tensions; Hind Copper rose 5.6%, Nifty Metal index gained 2.55%.
Steel prices rebounded strongly, up 30% since Dec 2025; aluminium prices saw a sharp rise amid Middle East supply disruptions.
news.summary:
Metal stocks surged as US-Iran talks eased geopolitical tensions; Hind Copper rose 5.6%, Nifty Metal index gained 2.55%.
Steel prices rebounded strongly, up 30% since Dec 2025; aluminium prices saw a sharp rise amid Middle East supply disruptions.

news.title:
National Aluminium, Hind Copper, and MCX among 7 Nifty 500 stocks surged 150%+ in 1 year despite volatility.
Nifty 50 gained 4% YoY, Nifty 500 rose 7%; 14 stocks delivered 100%+ returns, 7 of them jumped 150%+.
news.summary:
National Aluminium, Hind Copper, and MCX among 7 Nifty 500 stocks surged 150%+ in 1 year despite volatility.
Nifty 50 gained 4% YoY, Nifty 500 rose 7%; 14 stocks delivered 100%+ returns, 7 of them jumped 150%+.

news.title:
India collaborates with World Bank and ADB to mitigate geopolitical risks for private firms acquiring mines abroad.
Hindustan Copper acquires one block in Chile; PSUs bid for 4 blocks, awaiting Chilean government paperwork.
news.summary:
India collaborates with World Bank and ADB to mitigate geopolitical risks for private firms acquiring mines abroad.
Hindustan Copper acquires one block in Chile; PSUs bid for 4 blocks, awaiting Chilean government paperwork.

news.title:
Analysts discuss buy, hold, and sell strategies for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, RVNL, Tata Motors CV, Hindustan Copper, and HAL.
Recommendations include bullish targets for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, and Hindustan Copper, while advising caution for HAL and Max Healthcare.
news.summary:
Analysts discuss buy, hold, and sell strategies for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, RVNL, Tata Motors CV, Hindustan Copper, and HAL.
Recommendations include bullish targets for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, and Hindustan Copper, while advising caution for HAL and Max Healthcare.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper aims for Navratna status, citing improved operations, strategic growth, and organisational excellence.
The firm plans to expand mining capacity to 12.2MTPA by 2030, leveraging global partnerships and sustainable practices.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper aims for Navratna status, citing improved operations, strategic growth, and organisational excellence.
The firm plans to expand mining capacity to 12.2MTPA by 2030, leveraging global partnerships and sustainable practices.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper reported its best MIC sales in 5 years and highest ore production in 7 years, achieving 9% and 6% growth YoY respectively.
Shares last traded at Rs. 494.75 on BSE with intraday high/low of Rs. 499.05/468.30 and turnover of Rs. 621.1 Cr.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper reported its best MIC sales in 5 years and highest ore production in 7 years, achieving 9% and 6% growth YoY respectively.
Shares last traded at Rs. 494.75 on BSE with intraday high/low of Rs. 499.05/468.30 and turnover of Rs. 621.1 Cr.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper reports 27,421 tonnes metal production, up 9% YoY.
Ore production reached 3.67M tonnes, a 6% YoY increase; data is provisional.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper reports 27,421 tonnes metal production, up 9% YoY.
Ore production reached 3.67M tonnes, a 6% YoY increase; data is provisional.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel invests $1B in Nxtra for AI/cloud; Hindustan Copper plans ₹470-cr copper plant.
IREDA signs ECB deal worth ¥28B; Bajaj Auto's AAA rating reaffirmed by CARE Ratings.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel invests $1B in Nxtra for AI/cloud; Hindustan Copper plans ₹470-cr copper plant.
IREDA signs ECB deal worth ¥28B; Bajaj Auto's AAA rating reaffirmed by CARE Ratings.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper approves 3.0 MTPA copper plant construction at MCP, Madhya Pradesh.
The Rs.469.6 crore project by Ardee Engineering will complete in 27 months.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper approves 3.0 MTPA copper plant construction at MCP, Madhya Pradesh.
The Rs.469.6 crore project by Ardee Engineering will complete in 27 months.

news.title:
Metal stocks, including Vedanta, Tata Steel, and Hindustan Copper, fell up to 6% as Nifty Metal index dropped 4.25%.
Geopolitical tensions and supply concerns led to fears of demand destruction, impacting steel and aluminium producers.
news.summary:
Metal stocks, including Vedanta, Tata Steel, and Hindustan Copper, fell up to 6% as Nifty Metal index dropped 4.25%.
Geopolitical tensions and supply concerns led to fears of demand destruction, impacting steel and aluminium producers.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper among 4 Nifty500 stocks showing bullish White Marubozu pattern.
White Marubozu indicates opening as lowest and closing as highest price in a period.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper among 4 Nifty500 stocks showing bullish White Marubozu pattern.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper fined Rs. 9.8 lakh by BSE, NSE for SEBI compliance issues.
Non-compliance pertains to Board composition; company seeks exemption and appointments.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper fined Rs. 9.8 lakh by BSE, NSE for SEBI compliance issues.
Non-compliance pertains to Board composition; company seeks exemption and appointments.

news.title: Hindustan Copper plans to triple production capacity from 4M tonnes to 12.2M by 2031.
news.summary: Hindustan Copper plans to triple production capacity from 4M tonnes to 12.2M by 2031.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper fined Rs. 9.77 lakh by exchanges for board and committee non-compliance.
Company seeks director appointments to resolve issues and waive fines; board appointments tied to Ministry of Mines.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper fined Rs. 9.77 lakh by exchanges for board and committee non-compliance.
Company seeks director appointments to resolve issues and waive fines; board appointments tied to Ministry of Mines.

news.title:
Ministry of Mines stayed demand notice against Hindustan Copper by Jharkhand's District Mining Officer.
Stay effective till next hearing; state govt directed to avoid coercive actions impacting mining operations.
news.summary:
Ministry of Mines stayed demand notice against Hindustan Copper by Jharkhand's District Mining Officer.
Stay effective till next hearing; state govt directed to avoid coercive actions impacting mining operations.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper received ₹929 crore demand notice from Jharkhand for alleged Surda mine violations.
Q3 profit surged to ₹156 crore; revenue doubled to ₹687.3 crore. Shares fell 5.5% to ₹590.35 on BSE.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper received ₹929 crore demand notice from Jharkhand for alleged Surda mine violations.
Q3 profit surged to ₹156 crore; revenue doubled to ₹687.3 crore. Shares fell 5.5% to ₹590.35 on BSE.

news.title:
Hindustan Copper faces Rs.929.4 crore demand for alleged production without valid clearances.
The company denies allegations, plans legal action; financial impact depends on final order.
news.summary:
Hindustan Copper faces Rs.929.4 crore demand for alleged production without valid clearances.
The company denies allegations, plans legal action; financial impact depends on final order.
